livePreviews.content:
Habit Dashboard

Track your consistency with interactive weekly visualization.

Default View

Standard habit tracking visualization showing completion rates.

Evidence Layer

Hover over bars to see detailed completion data and streak information.

Comparison Mode

Compare current week performance against your baseline standards.

Weekly Progress

80%
Mon
60%
Tue
95%

40%
Thu
100%
Fri
75%
Sat
90%
Sun
Standard Baseline
Current Week
Performance Comparison

Current week average: 77% vs Baseline: 70% - You're exceeding your standard!

Weekly Overview

Track your daily habits across the week. Hover over bars to see detailed completion percentages.

Default View

Standard habit tracking visualization showing completion rates.

Evidence Layer

Hover over bars to see detailed completion data and streak information.

Comparison Mode

Compare current week performance against your baseline standards.

Weekly Summary

Great job! You completed 5 out of 7 days at 85% average. Keep the momentum going!

<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Habit Tracker Dashboard | Weekly Chart</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg: #f8fafc;
            --card-bg: #ffffff;
            --text-main: #0f172a;
            --text-muted: #64748b;
            --primary: #6366f1;
            --accent: #10b981;
            --border: #e2e8f0;
            --radius: 12px;
            --font: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
        }
        body { margin: 0; padding: 24px; background: var(--bg); font-family: var(--font); color: var(--text-main); line-height: 1.5; }
        .dashboard-grid { max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 24px; }
        .panel { background: var(--card-bg); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }
        h1, h2, h3 { margin-top: 0; color: var(--text-main); }
        
        /* Controls */
        .controls { margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        button { padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-main); transition: all 0.2s; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        button:hover { background: #f1f5f9; }
        button.active { background: var(--primary); color: white; border-color: var(--primary); }
        
        /* Chart Area */
        .chart-container { position: relative; margin-top: 20px; height: 300px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 12px; padding-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .bar-group { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 4px; align-items: center; height: 100%; position: relative; }
        .bar { width: 100%; background: var(--primary); border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; transition: height 0.5s ease; position: relative; }
preview.label: Direct author output

preview.content:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Habit Tracker Dashboard | Weekly Chart</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg: #f8fafc;
            --card-bg: #ffffff;
            --text-main: #0f172a;
            --text-muted: #64748b;
            --primary: #6366f1;
            --accent: #10b981;
            --border: #e2e8f0;
            --radius: 12px;
            --font: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
        }
        body { margin: 0; padding: 24px; background: var(--bg); font-family: var(--font); color: var(--text-main); line-height: 1.5; }
        .dashboard-grid { max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 24px; }
        .panel { background: var(--card-bg); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }
        h1, h2, h3 { margin-top: 0; color: var(--text-main); }
        
        /* Controls */
        .controls { margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        button { padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text-main); transition: all 0.2s; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        button:hover { background: #f1f5f9; }
        button.active { background: var(--primary); color: white; border-color: var(--primary); }
        
        /* Chart Area */
        .chart-container { position: relative; margin-top: 20px; height: 300px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 12px; padding-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .bar-group { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 4px; align-items: center; height: 100%; position: relative; }
        .bar { width: 100%; background: var(--primary); border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; transition: height 0.5s ease; position: relative; }
        .bar span { position: absolute; top: -20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;

livePreviews.content:
Habit Dashboard

Track your consistency with interactive weekly visualization.

Default View

Standard habit tracking visualization showing completion rates.

Evidence Layer

Hover over bars to see detailed completion data and streak information.

Comparison Mode

Compare current week performance against your baseline standards.

Weekly Progress

80%
Mon
60%
Tue
95%
Wed
40%
Thu
100%
Fri
75%
Sat
90%
Sun
Standard Baseline
Current Week
Performance Comparison

Current week average: 77% vs Baseline: 70% - You're exceeding your standard!

Weekly Overview

Track your daily habits across the week. Hover over bars to see detailed completion percentages.

Default View

Standard habit tracking visualization showing completion rates.

Evidence Layer

Hover over bars to see detailed completion data and streak information.

Comparison Mode

Compare current week performance against your baseline standards.

Weekly Summary

Great job! You completed 5 out of 7 days at 85% average. Keep the momentum going!

        .bar span { position: absolute; top: -20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;

livePreviews.content:
Habit Dashboard

Track your consistency with interactive weekly visualization.

Default View

Standard habit tracking visualization showing completion rates.

Evidence Layer

Hover over bars to see detailed completion data and streak information.

Comparison Mode

Compare current week performance against your baseline standards.

Weekly Progress

80%
Mon
60%
Tue
95%
Wed
40%
Thu
100%
Fri
75%
Sat
90%
Sun
Standard Baseline
Current Week
Performance Comparison

Current week average: 77% vs Baseline: 70% - You're exceeding your standard!

Weekly Overview

Track your daily habits across the week. Hover over bars to see detailed completion percentages.

Default View

Standard habit tracking visualization showing completion rates.

Evidence Layer

Hover over bars to see detailed completion data and streak information.

Comparison Mode

Compare current week performance against your baseline standards.

Weekly Summary

Great job! You completed 5 out of 7 days at 85% average. Keep the momentum going!
